content.verdict: Fivelements Puri Ahimsa is a nine-suite boutique wellness retreat on the Ayung River in Mambal, about 30 minutes south of Ubud, built entirely from sustainable materials in a swooping organic architectural style. It's adults-only, plant-based (seriously — no meat, no fish, no alcohol officially on the menu), and centered around sacred Balinese healing arts with a resident Tri Hita Karana healer. For honeymooners deeply into yoga, holistic wellness, or looking to set spiritual intentions, this is unlike anything else in Bali.
content.best_room: The Riverfront Suites (The River House and The Bamboo House) are the standouts — sweeping bamboo structures perched on the river with outdoor bathrooms and private plunge pools. Request the House of Om for the largest footprint.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Intention Setting
itinerary_7_nights.description: Transfer from Denpasar (75 min). Welcome ceremony at the river temple. Intention-setting session with the resident healer — candles, incense, crystals, and a couples' bonding ritual. Plant-based welcome dinner at Sakti Dining Room.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Yoga & Water Purification
itinerary_7_nights.description: Dawn yoga in the riverside shala, breakfast. Morning melukat purification ceremony at a sacred spring with the Balinese pemangku. Afternoon swim in the private pool, sunset meditation.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Balinese Healing Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Full-day Panca Mahabhuta Journey — the signature five-elements sacred-arts ritual spanning 4 hours with two traditional healers. Afternoon journaling retreat time. Evening sound healing session.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Ubud Excursion
itinerary_7_nights.description: Half-day into Ubud: visit the Sacred Monkey Forest, Campuhan Ridge walk, vegan lunch at Moksa. Afternoon couples' yoga and cacao ceremony on return.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Deep Spa Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning Watsu water therapy session as a couple — floating held in warm water. Afternoon breathwork session. Private dinner on the Ayung riverside rock ledge.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Adventure & Temples
itinerary_7_nights.description: Drive to Tirta Empul for private purification (water still sacred even if skeptical). Lunch at Clear Café. Back for sunset yin yoga and stargazing from the treetop pavilion.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Closing Ceremony & Departure
itinerary_7_nights.description: Final dawn yoga. Closing ceremony with the healer — intentions sealed, blessings given. Departure transfer to the airport. Most couples leave lighter and bonded.

caveats: Strictly plant-based (vegan-forward) — no meat, fish, or formal alcohol program. Serious eaters should pair this with a beach resort for indulgence.
Adults-only and wellness-focused — no kids, no clubs, no nightlife. You chose this for the depth, not the drama.
The bamboo architecture is stunning but does mean some soundtravel — floors creak, voices carry. Part of the open, organic experience.

faqs.a: Yes, minimum age 16. The atmosphere is hushed and contemplative — unsuitable for and uninteresting to children.

faqs.q: Do we have to be vegan/spiritual to enjoy this?
faqs.a: No — plenty of skeptics arrive and leave converts. The food is genuinely delicious (Sakti was the first raw-food Michelin-recommended restaurant in Asia). Treatments are offered but not forced.
Officially no alcohol menu; unofficially you can arrange for wine if requested discretely. Most couples lean into the detox aspect.
About 30 minutes drive from Ubud town, 45 min from the airport. It's more accessible than Amandari or COMO Shambhala Estate.

faqs.q: Can we get a conventional massage?
faqs.a: Yes, but the property is best-known for its Sacred Healing Arts — four-hand energetic and traditional Balinese rituals. A standard Swedish isn't really the point.

faqs.q: How does it compare to COMO Shambhala?
faqs.a: COMO Shambhala is a bigger, more clinical wellness hotel with doctors and programs; Fivelements is smaller, more spiritual, more intimate. COMO is 'treat and optimize', Fivelements is 'connect and heal'.

content.email_template:
Subject: Honeymoon booking — Riverfront Suite, 7 nights, [DATES]

Dear Fivelements reservations,

We're planning our honeymoon and would like to book a Riverfront Suite (ideally the House of Om) for 7 nights from [ARRIVAL] to [DEPARTURE].

Could you please share:
- Best available rate including full-board plant-based dining
- Honeymoon/intention-setting package inclusions
- Availability of the Panca Mahabhuta Journey and private melukat ceremony
- Airport transfer options
- Any workshops or retreats running concurrently we might join

Thank you — we're looking forward to the reset.

With gratitude,
[Your names]
